question: Based on this chart, what can be concluded about the relationship between training hours per month and productivity index within each team?

options.A: Within each team, more training hours clearly lead to lower productivity
options.B: Within each team, more training hours clearly lead to higher productivity
options.C: The chart only shows an overall trend line, so the relationship within each team cannot be determined reliably
options.D: The downward overall trend line proves that each team individually has a negative relationship between training hours and productivity

explanation: The trend line is fitted to all data points combined, mixing the two groups. It may suggest a negative overall relationship between the variables, but it does not tell us what the relationship looks like within School/Team A or B separately. Each group could have a different pattern (e.g., positive or flat), so we cannot infer within‑group relationships from this aggregated trend alone.
